transcript.text:
(Sinjeon) Sinjeon Tteokbokki
Don't tell me you don't know Sinjeon Tteokbokki!
(There's no way...)
(Who else would offer this cheese bomb other than Sinjeon?)
(An unstoppable tteokbokki-munching show)
It's so good
(And gimbap, cupbap, and even fried food)
(that you must have at Sinjeon Tteokbokki!)
(And there's no way we wouldn't know)
(this lady who enjoys our food this much!)
(If you don't know her, then let's find out now)
Hello everyone!
I was out for work at my restaurant today
(She's here to enjoy good food after working hard) I'm out to have lunch during my break time
(She's here to enjoy good food after working hard) It's around 4 p.m. right now
(Sinjeon Tteokbokki's been on my mind for a while) I've been craving Sinjeon Tteokbokki for a few months now

(Sinjeon Tteokbokki's been on my mind for a while) I was craving it so much
(Time to satisfy my needs) Today's show is mostly for fulfilling my desire
(No need to explain about it) I'm sure all of you know Sinjeon Tteokbokki!
I'll have have a quick lunch here
and get back to work
Let's head inside!
("Sinjeon Tteokbokki" - Bangbae branch)
Wow, this place is
It's been such a long time since I last visited
I used to come here around 3 times every week during high school days
I used to have all of their food
(Too many menus... :D) They have so much now. I probably can't do it
(Today's order) I'll... get...
Tteokbokki - Mild, Cheese tteokbokki - Medium
and Rosé pasta - Mild
I'll get one Tuna mayo cupbap,

one Corn cheese, one Sinjeon cheese gimbap,
and one assorted fried food
I'll get deep-fried squid, whole deep-fried squid,
one chicken ring, one cheese stick
(Done ordering) I'll have that for now
(Well, let's take a look...) Tuna mayo cupbap...
(Not done yet) Wait, I'll get one more
I'll also have one eomuk(fish cake) soup
- One eomuk soup - Ok
I'll change it to Bassak-bulgogi cupbap
- Bassak-bulgogi? - Yes
(Sinjeon Tteokbokki's keep lingering on my mind)
(You can't have tteokbokki without assorted fries)
(Sinjeon cheese gimbap is a must-have at Sinjeon Tteokbokki)
(All set)
(Sinjeon Tteokbokki - A lot of people's comfort food)

(Here comes the tteokbokki)
Thank you!
(The "Kimbap Nara" video uploaded on April 16th) I saw that video where you visited our neighborhood
- Oh, really? Haha - Yeah
(Even the staff acknowledged Kimbab Nara's professionalism) They serve really good food
(Even the staff acknowledged Kimbab Nara's professionalism) Right! Their gimbap is so good
(The owner watched ever since she streamed on AfreecaTV) I donated when you streamed on AfreecaTV
(The owner watched ever since she streamed on AfreecaTV) Really?
I donated for the first time back in the days
(The owner is her true fan!) Thank you! That's so cool!
(All ready to go)
I ordered
(Doesn't seem like enough food...) a lot of different things, but there aren't that many!
(I think I could get everything on the menu!) Maybe I should have gotten everything!
You know, that video where
you add a lot of cheese, pour the soup out

and mix the food went really viral
(A huge cheese bomb) Whoa!
(Splash) No! I spilled all the soup
(For some reason, I can't pull it off like others) They mixed the cheese very smoothly
Wow, the soup looks good
You shouldn't eat it like this
You have to eat it with the soup like this
It's so good!
(I really missed this intense black pepper flavor...) I really missed this black pepper flavor
Wait, fried food!
Cheese sticks go cold quickly so I gotta dig in
The cheese doesn't stretch!
Wow, I love that Sinjeon Tteokbokki has so much soup
Back in my high school days,
I challenged to see how much I can eat
Mmm!

I think I can have 5 at least!
Wow, look at that cheese!
(Magnificent)
Look at all that cheese!
Ugh, so spicy!
(The medium spiciness is around Buldak's spiciness!) It's slightly... It's around Buldak's spiciness!
I mostly had deep-fried fish cakes back in the days
Deep-fried fish cakes and deep-fried japchae
It's crispy!
They didn't have chicken rings back then
And it's become my bias menu
(This one next)
Rosé...
I don't think I've ever tried their Rosé tteokbokki!
(The rising star of tteokbokki industry - Rosé tteokbokki)
Wow, the rosé one

(Rosé lover) tastes even better!
It tastes like Sinjeon's red-colored tteokbokki
but much creamier
It's scrumptious!
I think Rosé tteokbokki is better!
This is so yummy
The corn cheese must be...
hardened by now...
(Thankfully, it's still warm) It's not the kind of corn cheese with stretchy cheese
Sinjeon...
Instead of restaurant-served corn cheese,
it seems more like a corn skewer
(A corn skewer you can get on the street?) with this kind of sauce you can get on the street
(Sinjeon Tteokbokki's signature dish) Sinjeon Cheese Gimbap! It's really hot when it's just served
Cupbap!
Let's start with Tuna mayo first

(Sinjeon's hidden yummy menu - Cupbap)
(The Tuna mayo cupbap tastes even better as it feels familiar)
I knew they added enough
tuna in here!
I came to Sinjeon Tteokbokki like every single day
around 10 years ago
A lot of students visited at the time
(Sinjeon's still popular these days) And they still have a lot of student customers!
(Wow)
I can't remember how much it was
I think it was around 3,000 won 10 years ago
(Was 2,000 won in 2013)
Deep-fried japchae! I missed this goodie
This gimbap is called Sinjeon gimbap
It's filled with kimchi-fried rice
(Sinjeon cheese gimbap packed with cheese) There's a round cheese in the middle

It's not very airy like plain gimbap
It's very mushy
It doesn't...
feel like eating gimbap
It's more like eating fried rice with seaweed
(Down you go)
(Ice cubes)
(Shake it!)
(Love it)
Hello!
(Received newsletter for the first time in years! Haha) Look, a newsletter!
(Let us get your autograph)
(A pad...?) iPads...
(And even on their midterm exam sheet?) It's my midterm exam sheet
(A circle collector) Ooh, she got everything right!
(And even after-school worksheets...Haha) It's an answer sheet for after school worksheets...

(Left a beautiful autograph wherever they wanted)
(We wish you the happiest school days!)
Wow, tuna!
I think ordering just the tuna one was a good choice
Tuna mayo is perfect compared to Spam mayo
It's a perfect pair!
Oh, I forgot the deep-fried fish cakes
You know Sinjeon's known for their deep-fried fish cakes
It was revolutionary at the time
It was so cool to see deep-fried fish cakes exist
(Deep-fried seaweed roll) A must-have dish
(You're next)
This is their new menu
How did I not try this until now?
(Bassak-bulgogi cupbap released in 2020) I don't know when it was released
(Goosebumps: It was released exactly 3 years ago) It's been around 3 years but it could be new for me

(A high-quality cupbap with bulgogi) Ooh, it's packed with bulgogi!
(A high-quality cupbap with bulgogi) Ooh, it's hearty!
You know those cupbap lunch boxes
It seems like...
It seems like a legit cupbap
If I recall correctly, there were around
at least two branches
in a single neighborhood a few years ago
(I miss my shining school days) I miss my school days once in a while
Nah
(Thinking I need to study is making me dizzy) Forget about it
The Rosé tteokbokki is so good
I gotta get back to work
so I'll dig in!
(Slipped)
You see...

When I try to lift 5, only 4 comes up
(It's weird logic but...) That means if I lift 6, 5 will come up!
(It worked?!) That's right!
Director, do kids love Sinjeon Tteokbokki?
They love it!
Really?
They tend to order them frequently
(A consistent seller loved by all generations!) Wow, it sure is popular for a long time! Even I had it when I was young
(Slurp)
(Students coming in after school) There are crowds of customers flooding in! I gotta rush
I think people of all ages love their tteokbokki
Both kids and adults love them
Spicy?
(You shall become Rosé, my dear!) Let's dip it in here
I think it'll make it milder
Oh my

(Unnie, you're gorgeous) (A cheering card and a cute bunny offered as a gift)
(You're the best!)
(This student even proved that she visited Tzuyang's restaurant!) Thank you so much! Oh my...
- I really enjoyed your food - Really?
She visited my restaurant too...
(Hehe)
It doesn't feel like plain squid! It's more like cuttlefish
I'll finish the tteokbokki first
(Clean)
and I'll get back to work asap!
Again, I had a wonderful meal today!
